recommendations.title: The Ouija Experiment 2: Theatre of Death

recommendations.title: Strange Darling
recommendations.overview: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer’s vicious murder spree.

recommendations.title: Witchboard
recommendations.overview: Playing around with a Ouija board, a trio of friends succeeds in contacting the spirit of a young boy. Trouble begins when the evil spirit, Malfeitor, takes over one of their bodies.

recommendations.title: The Conjuring
recommendations.overview: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren work to help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their farmhouse. Forced to confront a powerful entity, the Warrens find themselves caught in the most terrifying case of their lives.

recommendations.title: The 100 Candles Game
recommendations.overview: A group of friends must confront their fears in a terrifying game. They must sit by the other players in a circle made of a hundred candles, take one of them and tell a horror story. As stories are told and candles blown out, strange events will star
recommendations.director: Nicholas Peterson, Guillermo Lockhart, Oliver Lee Garland, Nicolás Onetti, Daniel Rübesam, Victor Català, Christopher West, Brian Deane

recommendations.title: Talk to Me
recommendations.overview: When a group of friends discover how to conjure spirits using an embalmed hand, they become hooked on the new thrill, until one of them goes too far and unleashes terrifying supernatural forces.

recommendations.title: Death Whisperer 2
recommendations.overview: Three years after his sister's death, Yak relentlessly searches for the dark spirit that killed her in hopes of seeking revenge.

recommendations.title: Repeaters
recommendations.overview: A gritty mind-bending thriller about three twenty-somethings who find themselves in an impossible time labyrinth, where each day they awaken to the same terrifying day as the preceding one.

recommendations.title: Louis C.K.: Shameless
